chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 1475 of 2023 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders as to non-prosecution. 13.05.2026 Mr. Ghulam Nabi Shar, advocate for the applicant. Matter is pending since 2023 and remains listed for orders as to non-prosecution. Numerous office objections including the issue of time bar are raised. Office note demonstrates that none has made compliance of those objections since 07.08.2023. Even today learned counsel merely seeks time for no cogent reason whatsoever. It appears that applicant is not interested in the present proceedings. Accordingly, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, the reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
